info.title: OpenAPI ColorBox
info.description: This is a REST API for the AJA ColorBox product.

get.description: Return an object with the system configuration
Return an object with the system status

kind.description: The kind of file being uploaded valid kinds are: **lut_1d**, **lut_3d**, **matrix**, **image**, **overlay**, **preset**, **orionPreset**, **license**, **update**

entry.description: The entry number to upload the file to, **not** used with kinds: **license** and **update**

kind.description: The kind of file being uploaded valid kinds are: **amf**

entry.description: The entry number to upload the file to

selection.description: The AMF file that should be used from the sent files, an uploaded directory can contain multiple AMF files, the one that matches this parameter will be the one stored to the device.

post.description: Request a license request file to be generated

get.description: Get the System Preset Library array
Get the Orion Preset Library array
Return an array of all the NetDevice objects.
Return an object with status for network interface at devIdx

put.description: Set the status for network interface at devIdx

get.description: Return an object with config for network interface at devIdx

put.description: Set the config for network interface at devIdx

get.description: Return an object with active params for network interface at devIdx

put.description: Set the active params for network interface at devIdx

get.description: Return an object with staged params for network interface at devIdx

put.description: Set the staged params for network interface at devIdx

get.description: Return the complete wifi config object
Return the complete wifi status object
Return an array of objects with the discovered devices

put.description: Modify the array of discovered devices

get.description: Return the acn capture filter object

put.description: Modify the anc capture filter object

post.description: Request a save of the current dynamic lut state. **Note:** This API call should be used sparingly as it writes a file to flash which has a finite number of write cycles.

BuildInfo.description: Build particulars from when the application was built.

date.description: Date of the build, in local time of build machine

time.description: Time of the build, in local time of build machine

pipelineBypassButton.description: This is the bypass state due to the button on the device being pressed

pipelineBypassUser.description: This is the bypass state set by the user in the UI

enabled.description: true if stage is enabled else disabled (unity passthru)

dynamic.description: true if stage can be dynamically adjusted

libraryEntry.description: library entry number, zero is unity bypass

enabled.description: true if frame store is enabled else disabled

dynamic.description: true if frame store can be dynamically adjusted

imageName.description: The custom name for the captured image

timecodeAppended.description: Flag to append the timecode of the captured image onto the filename

fileType.description: File type for the captured image

libraryEntry.description: library entry number, zero is black

enabled.description: true if overlay is enabled else disabled

libraryEntry.description: library entry number of user overlay graphic

entry.description: The library entry to act on(starting at 1)

action.description: Action to be performed on the library entry

data.description: Data to be used with action

errorMsg.description: Message to alert when things go wrong

enabled.description: true if stage is enabled else disabled (unity passthru)
true if stage is enabled else disabled (unity passthru)

inDynRangeGamut.description: **NOTE** Used in ColorBox v1, left in for compatibility reasons

outDynRangeGamut.description: **NOTE** Used in ColorBox v1, left in for compatibility reasons

tvMode.description: Setting for when in TV mode

liveMode.description: Setting for when in Live mode

upmapMode.description: Setting for when in SDR to Dolby Vision Preview mode

ColorfrontDynRangeGamut.description: **NOTE** Used in ColorBox v1, left in for compatibility reasons

enum: Rec.2100-HLG - Display/ACES 1.1 - HDR Video (1000 nits & Rec.2020 lim)
Rec.2100-PQ - Display/ACES 1.1 - HDR Video (1000 nits & Rec.2020 lim)
Rec.2100-PQ - Display/ACES 1.1 - HDR Video (2000 nits & Rec.2020 lim)
Rec.2100-PQ - Display/ACES 1.1 - HDR Video (4000 nits & Rec.2020 lim)

enabled.description: true if stage is enabled else disabled (unity passthru)

amfLibraryEntry.description: library entry number, zero is unity bypass

StatusState.description: The good/maybe/bad/unknown of the status object

upperBoundGood.description: The upper bound for the state to be considered StatusStateGood

upperBoundMaybe.description: The upper bound for the state to be considered StatusStateMaybe

value.description: The instantaneous value for this status object

valueInt.description: The instantaneous value for this status object

label.description: A descriptive label of what this status object represents

extraValue.description: A second value that is optional

extraLabel.description: A second descriptive label for the extraValue

depth.description: The color depth in bits, valid values are: 8, 10, 12 & 16

blue.description: The blue component of the color, max value depends on bit depth

green.description: The green component of the color, max value depends on bit depth

red.description: The red component of the color, max value depends on bit depth

xstart.description: The x start point in for the rect, normalized to 0.0 - 1.0

ystart.description: The y start point in for the rect, normalized to 0.0 - 1.0

width.description: The width of the rect, normalized to 0.0 - 1.0

height.description: The height of the rect, normalized to 0.0 - 1.0

CalibrationPattern.description: Holds the information for a calibration pattern patch
